candidate.notes: different labels in same place place_00000

object_a.label: chair
object_a.long_form_open_description: Single dark brown leather recliner armchair with padded back and armrests. Positioned near the left opening to the kitchen and slightly in front of a small wooden side table. Leather has similar finish to the sofa indicating a matched set.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: left of the fireplace and mantle, adjacent to the kitchen entry; to the left of the center sofa
object_a.object_text_long: left sector | Single dark brown leather recliner armchair with padded back and armrests. Positioned near the left opening to the kitchen and slightly in front of a small wooden side table. Leather has similar finish to the sofa indicating a matched set.
object_a.text_input_for_clip_long: left sector | Single dark brown leather recliner armchair with padded back and armrests. Positioned near the left opening to the kitchen and slightly in front of a small wooden side table. Leather has similar finish to the sofa indicating a matched set.

object_b.label: table
object_b.description: small wooden side table with decorative items
object_b.long_form_open_description: Small dark wooden side/end table positioned between the left recliner and the fireplace wall. Appears to hold small decorative items (unclear in image) and is about standard side-table height with a drawer or panel front.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: immediately to the right of the left armchair and to the left of the fireplace
